title: [YTP] The Faces of Evil as performed by the Franz Ferdinand
description:
"Please fill in the gap using two to five words of your choice".
No, Mr Examiner, I won't do that. Instead, I'll take all the tracks from the first three Franz Ferdinand albums and use each of them to create no less than two but no more than five words to fill in the sentences. Also, I won't use the sentences on the sheet provided, but will replace them with dialogue from a badly animated intro sequence to a video game. Regards, Moto200.

NOTE: Although this is my own idea that I thought of waaay back ("what if I reversed the concept of sentence-mixed YTPMVs?"), there are lots of similar vids that preceed mine, such as this one: http://youtu.be/f7Dgj1AXxzA . I think it's only natural that many people have thought of this, so don't accuse me of stealing:)

Audio and CD covers owned by Domino Records.
